description_long: This is a dark brown wooden chair with a tall, rectangular backrest featuring a cut-out rectangular design in the center. The seat is flat and appears to be cushioned or upholstered with a matching dark material, giving it a slightly softer appearance compared to the rest of the structure. The chair stands on four straight, sturdy legs, each with a simple, blocky profile. The backrest is solid and extends well above the seat, providing ample support for the upper back. There are no armrests, making the design minimalistic and functional. The overall aesthetic is modern yet robust, suitable for both formal and casual urban settings.
description: A dark brown wooden chair with a tall, rectangular backrest and a cushioned seat, featuring a modern cut-out design and no armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, straight backrest and the thickness of the cushioned seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular cut-out in the backrest and the wide, flat seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the tall backrest and seat profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid backrest and the rectangular cut-out, with both back legs visible.
